name: easyploy-standard
description: Self-hosted backend stack with PostgreSQL + PostgREST + GoTrue + MinIO - hosting friendly with CLI access

files.content:
{
  "name": "{{PROJECT_NAME}}",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc && vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "db:up": "docker-compose up -d postgres",
    "db:migrate": "psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/001_init.sql",
    "db:console": "psql $DATABASE_URL",
    "api:up": "docker-compose up -d postgrest",
    "auth:up": "docker-compose up -d gotrue",
    "storage:up": "docker-compose up -d minio",
    "stack:up": "docker-compose up -d",
    "stack:down": "docker-compose down",
    "stack:logs": "docker-compose logs -f"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "react": "^18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "@supabase/supabase-js": "^2.39.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/react": "^18.2.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0",
    "vite": "^5.0.0"
  }
}

version: '3.8'

services:
  # Database
  postgres:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-postgres}
      POSTGRES_DB: app
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./migrations:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  # Auto-generated REST API
  postgrest:
    image: postgrest/postgrest:v11.0.0
    environment:
      PGRST_DB_URI: postgres://postgres:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-postgres}@postgres:5432/app
      PGRST_DB_SCHEMA: public
      PGRST_DB_ANON_ROLE: anon
      PGRST_JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-your-jwt-secret}
    ports:
      - "3001:3000"
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy

  # Auth service
  gotrue:
    image: supabase/gotrue:v2.0.0
    environment:
      GOTRUE_DB_DRIVER: postgres
      GOTRUE_DB_DATABASE_URL: postgres://postgres:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-postgres}@postgres:5432/app?sslmode=disable
      GOTRUE_JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-your-jwt-secret}
      GOTRUE_JWT_EXP: 3600
      GOTRUE_JWT_DEFAULT_GROUP_NAME: authenticated
      GOTRUE_SITE_URL: ${SITE_URL:-http://localhost:3000}
      GOTRUE_URI_ALLOW_LIST: "*"
      GOTRUE_DISABLE_SIGNUP: "false"
      GOTRUE_MAILER_AUTOCONFIRM: "true"
      GOTRUE_EXTERNAL_EMAIL_ENABLED: "true"
      GOTRUE_EXTERNAL_PHONE_ENABLED: "false"
      GOTRUE_SMTP_HOST: ${SMTP_HOST:-mail.gmx.net}
      GOTRUE_SMTP_PORT: ${SMTP_PORT:-587}
      GOTRUE_SMTP_USER: ${SMTP_USER:-}
      GOTRUE_SMTP_PASS: ${SMTP_PASS:-}
      GOTRUE_SMTP_SENDER_NAME: ${SMTP_SENDER:-}
    ports:
      - "9999:9999"
    depends_on:
      - postgres

  # Storage (S3-compatible)
  minio:
    image: minio/minio:latest
    command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: ${MINIO_ROOT_USER:-minioadmin}
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD:-minioadmin}
    volumes:
      - minio_data:/data
    ports:
      - "9000:9000"
      - "9001:9001"

  # Create buckets on startup
  minio-init:
    image: minio/mc:latest
    depends_on:
      - minio
    entrypoint: >
      /bin/sh -c "
      sleep 5;
      mc alias set local http://minio:9000 $${MINIO_ROOT_USER:-minioadmin} $${MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD:-minioadmin};
      mc mb local/uploads || true;
      mc policy set public local/uploads;
      "

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  minio_data:

# Database
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=your-secure-password

# Auth
JWT_SECRET=your-jwt-secret-min-32-chars
SITE_URL=http://localhost:3000

# SMTP (optional)
SMTP_HOST=mail.gmx.net
SMTP_PORT=587
SMTP_USER=your-email@gmx.de
SMTP_PASS=your-email-password
SMTP_SENDER=your-email@gmx.de

# Storage
MINIO_ROOT_USER=minioadmin
MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD=minioadmin

# API URLs (for frontend)
VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3001
VITE_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:9999
VITE_STORAGE_URL=http://localhost:9000

# {{PROJECT_NAME}}

Created with **easyploy-standard** template.

## What's Included

- **PostgreSQL** - Database
- **PostgREST** - Auto-generated REST API
- **GoTrue** - Auth (compatible with Supabase Auth)
- **MinIO** - S3-compatible storage
- **React + TypeScript** - Frontend

## Quick Start

### 1. Setup Environment
```bash
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your settings
```

### 2. Start the Stack
```bash
npm run stack:up
```

### 3. Run Migrations
```bash
npm run db:migrate
```

### 4. Start Frontend
```bash
npm run dev
```

## CLI Access

### Database
```bash
npm run db:console    # psql shell
npm run db:migrate      # Run migrations
```

### API (PostgREST)
```bash
curl http://localhost:3001/todos
```

### Auth (GoTrue)
```bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:9999/signup \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email":"user@example.com","password":"password"}'
```

### Storage (MinIO)
```bash
# Using MinIO Client (mc)
mc alias set local http://localhost:9000 minioadmin minioadmin
mc ls local/uploads
```

## Services

| Service | URL | Purpose |
|---------|-----|---------|
| Frontend | http://localhost:3000 | React App |
| API | http://localhost:3001 | PostgREST |
| Auth | http://localhost:9999 | GoTrue |
| Storage | http://localhost:9000 | MinIO |
| Storage Console | http://localhost:9001 | MinIO UI |

## Deployment

```bash
easyploy deploy
```

## MCP Server

This template includes an MCP server for AI integration:

```bash
npx easyploy-mcp serve
```

Available tools:
- `query_database` - Run SQL queries
- `create_record` - Insert data
- `upload_file` - Store files
- `auth_user` - Manage users
